package.name: frenet_odom_republisher
package.description: /odom (cartesian) 을 frenet 좌표로 변환해 /odom_frenet 로 republish. GB raceline (/global_waypoints) 과 Smart Static fixed path (/planner/avoidance/smart_static_otwpnts) 두 frame 동시 지원. 원본 ROS1 (C++): f110_utils/nodes/frenet_odom_republisher. SH ROS2 Jazzy 포팅 — Python (frenet_conversion lib import).
